headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all headings above 32px. Use for dashboard titles, card headers, and North Star metrics.

body.usage: Clean, highly legible monospace-adjacent font for data tables, ticket logs, and technical status descriptions.

labels.style: Uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs to text-sm, font-semibold
labels.usage: Use for overlines, status tags, table column headers, and small metadata.

colors.theme_strategy: High-Contrast Tactical / Swiss Brutalist. Supports both Light and Dark mode. Dark mode must feel like a command center.
usage_rules: NEVER rely purely on color for status. Always pair a status color (e.g., Red) with a text label (e.g., 'Wire Cut' or 'Critical') or icon.
Use 1px borders to separate surfaces instead of heavy shadows (Grid Borders Technical Look).

visual enhancers.borders: 1px solid border (border-border) on cards, tables, and widgets. Exposed grid skeleton style for admin dashboard.
visual enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use shadow-sm for interactive elements. Avoid large blurry drop-shadows. Focus on 'Tactical Minimalism'.
visual enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for floating navigation or sticky headers only. Apply backdrop-blur-xl with a 1px delicate inner stroke.
visual enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) on the dark mode background to reduce digital flatness.
visual enhancers.shapes: Sharp corners or minimal border-radius (max 8px / rounded-md) to reinforce the technical/professional nature.

component name.tables: Shadcn Table. Use sticky headers, row heights of 48-52px. Hover state on rows.
component name.status_badges: Shadcn Badge. Flat background with colored text (e.g., bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500).
component name.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea, Select. For reporting issues and feedback.
component name.notifications: Sonner (Toasts) for restoration alerts and new ticket pings.
component name.cards: Shadcn Card. Flattened, 1px border, no shadow unless hovered.
component name.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Used to switch between 'All Routers', 'Active Issues', 'Resolved'. Override default h-9 to h-auto.
component name.charts: Recharts via Shadcn Chart components for uptime, resolution time metrics.

grids.admin_dashboard: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-6. Top row for North Star KPIs (col-span-1 each). Map/Topology spanning col-span-2 or 3.
grids.user_dashboard: Bento Grid Mode B. Focused on 'Current Status' (large card, col-span-full md:col-span-2) and 'Recent Tickets' (col-span-full md:col-span-1).

layouts.app_shell_admin: Left Collapsible Sidebar (240px wide) + Top Header (sticky, with Notification Bell and Theme Toggle) + Main Content Area.
layouts.app_shell_user: Top Navigation Bar (Crystal Glassmorphism) + Centered Main Content Area (max-w-5xl).
layouts.spacing: Generous inner padding. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Gap-6 between grid items.
layouts.f_pattern: Place the most critical metric (Active Wire Cuts / Critical Issues) at the top-left of the admin dashboard.

motion.loading: Skeleton screens for router data and ticket lists (no spinners).
motion.interactions: Hover states on table rows and buttons must lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) or change background color.
motion.transitions: Use specific transition classes (transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform) NEVER transition-all.
motion.lists: Staggered entrance animations for router items and tickets using framer-motion.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Status badges must have high contrast text against their tinted backgrounds.
accessibility.motion_preference: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all framer-motion animations.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, tabs, table rows, form inputs) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

media.icons: lucide-react. Ensure icons are paired with text for status indicators (e.g., AlertTriangle for wire cuts).
media.images: Use professional server room backgrounds for the login page to establish corporate ISP context.

3d libraries and steps.recommendation: Use react-force-graph-2d for mapping the 2000 client routers if a topology view is built. Otherwise, rely on Recharts for data density.
3d libraries and steps.installation: yarn add recharts lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
3d libraries and steps.usage: If utilizing react-force-graph-2d, nodes should be colored based on status (Green/Red/Yellow). Set background to transparent to blend with UI.

login_background.description: Server racks in dark room. Use as background for the Demo Login page with a heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text contrast.

hero_network_abstract.description: Abstract network visualization. Can be used as a subtle background header image for the User Portal.

admin_avatar.description: Professional man in suit. Use for the Admin/Dealer profile picture.

user_avatar.description: Professional woman in formal attire. Use for the generic Client/User profile picture.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not center align layouts globally. Avoid generic rounded SaaS aesthetics; use sharp corners (rounded-md max) and 1px borders to mimic a technical control center. Implement robust Dark/Light mode support. Use glassmorphism only for sticky headers, never for data cards. Embed `data-testid` on all interactable elements. Build a responsive left-sidebar for Admin and a clean top-nav for Users. Prioritize high-density data tables over large empty cards for the Admin view. Do not use transition-all. Use pure Tailwind for layout structures, and Shadcn for complex interactables.
